headline: Trump-Iran CRACKED DOOR рҹҳ©рҹҡӘ SLAMS SHUT рҹ’Ҙрҹӣ‘
text:
Trump рҹҚҠрҹ‘ЁвҖҚрҹ’ј dropping BOMBS рҹ’Јрҹ“ұ on X рҹҡҖрҹҗҰ claiming 'VERY STRONG TALKS' рҹ’¬рҹ”Ҙ with Iran mullahs рҹ•ҢрҹҳӨ for TOTAL MIDEAST PEACE вңҢпёҸрҹҢҚ вҖ“ but Tehran ayatollahs рҹ‘івҖҚвҷӮпёҸрҹҡ« straight-up DENY рҹ‘Һ any chit-chat, calling it FAKE NEWS рҹӨҘрҹ“° to pump OIL PRICES вӣҪрҹ“Ҳ and buy time for BOMB DROPS рҹ’Ҙрҹӣ©пёҸ! Small WINDOW рҹҡӘрҹ•іпёҸ CRACKED open like a teases-only OnlyFans peek рҹ‘Җрҹ’Ұ, but previous DIPLOMACY ROUNDS рҹ’” shattered by Israeli ZIONIST STRIKES рҹҮ®рҹҮұрҹ’Ј on Iran nukes рҹ§ЁвҡӣпёҸ вҖ“ trust BUSTED harder than Epstein's client list рҹҚҶрҹ“ң!

Lead negotiators Abbas Araghchi рҹ•Ңрҹ“һ and Steve Witkoff рҹ’јрҹӨқ whispering PRELIMINARY VIBES рҹ“ІрҹҳҸ, but Iran smells SUBTERFUGE рҹ•өпёҸвҖҚвҷӮпёҸрҹӨЎ вҖ“ 'Trump's just GASLIGHTING вӣҪрҹҳҲ to crash ENERGY BILLS рҹ’ёрҹ“ү and flex on WALL STREET рҹӨ‘рҹ“Ҡ before MAXIMUM PRESSURE 2.0!' Observers nodding рҹ‘Ң like simps at a Kanye rant рҹҺӨрҹҳӨ, with Donnie under HEAT рҹ”Ҙ to END this OIL WAR рҹ”ҘвӣҪ shaking GLOBAL MARKETS рҹҢҚрҹ’Ҙ вҖ“ even MURICA wallets рҹҳ©рҹ’і hurting!

Trump hunting IRAN'S VENEZUELA VIXEN рҹҮ»рҹҮӘрҹ‘©вҖҚрҹҰ° like Delcy RodrГӯguez 2.0 вҖ“ pragmatic BADDIE рҹ’…рҹ”Ҙ he can BEND OVER рҹ“ҸрҹҚ‘, but Iran's 50-YR HARDENED MULLAH MACHINE рҹ•ҢвҡҷпёҸ no pushover, sidelining reformist cucks рҹӨЎрҹҡ« and CRUSHING DISSENT рҹ‘Ҡрҹҳ ! Now whispering to 'TOP PERSON' Mohammad-Bagher Ghalibaf рҹ•¶пёҸрҹ‘®вҖҚвҷӮпёҸ вҖ“ ex-cop boss рҹҡ”, IRGC AIR FORCE COMMANDER вңҲпёҸрҹ’Ҙ, parliament SPEAKER рҹ—ЈпёҸрҹҸӣпёҸ who flopped 4 prez runs рҹҳӮрҹҸғвҖҚвҷӮпёҸ and labeled street protesters 'TERRORISTS' рҹ‘№рҹҡ« in Feb riots рҹ”Ҙрҹ—ј!

In Trumpverse рҹҢҢрҹҚҠ, Ghalibaf's the STRONGMAN BRIDGE рҹҸ—пёҸрҹ’Ә linking Iran's security thugs рҹӣЎпёҸрҹҳҲ and politico hacks рҹ•ҙпёҸрҹӨқ вҖ“ indirect DMs sliding in рҹ“ұрҹ‘Җ, but NO OFFICIAL WINS рҹҸҶвқҢ cuz Israel assassin CREW рҹҮ®рҹҮұрҹ”Ә just smoked Ali Larijani рҹӘҰрҹ’Җ, the hardline insider who KNEW THE GAME рҹҺ®рҹ”Ҙ! Sources spilling TEA вҳ•: 'Last IDEO-FLEX DUDE standing рҹ§ҚвҖҚвҷӮпёҸрҹҳҺ, but Trump spills name and BOOM вҖ“ Mossad on SPEED DIAL рҹ“һрҹ’Ҙ!' Ellie Geranmayeh рҹӨ“рҹ“ҡ hyping it as 'MOST INTERESTING TRACK' рҹӣӨпёҸрҹ”Ҙ, but NO MOVES yet рҹҡ«вҸі вҖ“ need POLITICAL BREAKTHROUGH рҹҡҖ before HIGH-LEVEL MEET рҹ«Ӯ!

Ghalibaf TROLLING HARD рҹӨірҹҳҲ on X: 'PEEPS WANT AGGRESSORS HUMILIATED рҹҚ‘рҹҳЎ вҖ“ ZERO TALKS WITH SATAN USA рҹҮәрҹҮёрҹ‘№!' War GRINDING рҹҳ©вҡ”пёҸ, survival mode ON рҹӣЎпёҸрҹ”’, diplomacy just PHONE TAG рҹ“һрҹ”„ from newbies Pakistan рҹҮөрҹҮ°рҹ•Ң, Egypt рҹҮӘрҹҮ¬рҹ‘‘, Turkey рҹҰғрҹҘҷ cozying Trump bros рҹӨқрҹҚҠ вҖ“ even Oman рҹ•Ңрҹ•ҠпёҸ pushing Strait of Hormuz REOPEN рҹҡўрҹҢҠ! Gulf Arabs FURIOUS рҹҳЎрҹҸңпёҸ over Iran 'RECKLESS' INFRA HITS рҹ’ҘрҹӣўпёҸ: 'DECADES to FIX this BEEF рҹҢӯрҹ”Ҙ!'

Pakistan offering HOST PAD рҹҸ рҹҺү for weekend SUMMIT рҹҘі post-Trump's energy strike THREAT рҹҡ«рҹӣ©пёҸ, with Mojtaba Khamenei рҹ•Ңрҹ‘‘ Jr. name-dropping Pak as DADDY'S FAVE рҹҮөрҹҮ°вқӨпёҸ вҖ“ but Ali Vaez рҹҳҗрҹҡ« says 'NO TALKS RN, just CEASEFIRE JUMPSTART рҹ”§рҹӣ‘ вҖ“ miles from REAL DEALS рҹӨқвқҢ!' Iran DROPPING IMPOSSIBLE DEMANDS рҹ“ңрҹҡ«: Shut US BASES рҹҸ°рҹҡӘ, REPARATIONS рҹ’°рҹҚ‘, NO FUTURE ZIONIST AGGRO рҹҮ®рҹҮұвӣ”! Gulf wants IRAN MISSILES рҹ§Ёрҹ“Ӣ and Hormuz LOCKDOWN рҹ”’рҹҢҠ on table!

Trump thinks WAR = LEVERAGE рҹ’Әвҡ–пёҸ for HIS TERMS рҹ“ңрҹҚҠ, Iran flexing HORMUZ CHOKEHOLD рҹҢҠрҹҳҲ as BARGAIN CHIP рҹ§©рҹ’Ҙ вҖ“ DEEP GULF OF BULLSHIT рҹӨҘрҹҢҠ! Donnie postpones POWER PLANT SMACK рҹ’ҘвҡЎ for 5 DAYS вҸірҹ“… вҖ“ FRIDAY DEADLINE рҹ•ӣрҹ’Ј when markets CLOSE рҹ“үрҹҡӘ, all eyes on OIL ORGY вӣҪрҹ’Ұ chaos!
